name: HaysMed Center for Health Improvement
description: HaysMed Center for Health Improvement is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hays, KS. There are 2 indoor wood courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Hays Municipal Park
description: Hays Municipal Park is a place to play pickleball in Hays, KS. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Hays Recreation Commission
description: Hays Recreation Commission is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hays, KS. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.
